---
title: "A. Villani's microglia RNAseq"
author: "Izaskun Mallona, UZH"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    code_download: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: kable
    theme: lumen
params:
  seed: 665
---


```{r warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## .libPaths('/home/imallona/R/R4_bioc314')
library(ggplot2)
## library(EnhancedVolcano)
## library(iSEE)
## library(knitr)
## library(DRIMSeq)
## library(EnsDb.Hsapiens.v86)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(corrplot)
#library(GGally)
#library(scuttle)
#library(knitr)
#library(greybox) # cramer's distance
#library(viridis)
#library(regioneR)
#library(GenomicRanges)
#library(rtracklayer)

## camera start

## library(dplyr)
## library(msigdbr)
## library(CAMERA)

#require(topGO)
#require(org.Hs.eg.db)

## library("ggVennDiagram")
library(recount3)
```



```{r}
opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 8,
               fig.height = 8,
               cache = TRUE,
               include = TRUE,
               fig.path = "plots/",
               dev = c("png", "svg"),
               cache.lazy = FALSE,
               warning = TRUE,
               message = TRUE,
               dpi = 500)

## plan("multiprocess", workers = NTHREADS)
## options(future.globals.maxSize= 1.4e9)

options(bitmapType='cairo')
```

# Aim

# Data

## Ambra's

```{r}
d <- readRDS('/home/imallona/avillani_microglia/ambra_only_output/outputR/shiny_sce.rds')$sce_gene
```

## Abud


```{r, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
srp <- "SRP092075"
abud <- recount3::create_rse_manual(
                    project = srp,
                    project_home = "data_sources/sra",
                    organism = "human",
                    annotation = "gencode_v29",
                    type = "gene")

assay(abud, "counts") <- transform_counts(abud)

summary(assay(abud, 'counts'))

```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
abud <- subset(abud,
             select = colData(sg)$sra.sample_title %in%
                                 c('siControl 1', 'siControl 2', 'siControl 3',
                                   'siTDP-43 1', 'siTDP-43 2', 'siTDP-43 3'))
metadata <- colData(abud)
```

## McQuade TREM

```{r}

srp <- 'SRP281230'

trem <- recount3::create_rse_manual(
                    project = srp,
                    project_home = "data_sources/sra",
                    organism = "human",
                    annotation = "gencode_v29",
                    type = "gene")

assay(trem, "counts") <- transform_counts(trem)

```

## McQuade

```{r}
srp <- 'SRP155574'

mc <- recount3::create_rse_manual(
                    project = srp,
                    project_home = "data_sources/sra",
                    organism = "human",
                    annotation = "gencode_v29",
                    type = "gene")

assay(mc, "counts") <- transform_counts(mc)

```


# Procedure


# Timestamp

```{r sessionInfo2, cache = FALSE}
date()
sessionInfo()
devtools::session_info()
```
